tasks.title: WebSocket Integration (Real-time Pulse)
tasks.description: Replace 5s polling with Socket.io for instant dashboard updates (Git status, logs).

tasks.title: Knowledge Search Index (SQLite)
tasks.description: Implement a simple indexing service to avoid reading hundreds of files on every LLM prompt.

tasks.title: Self-Healing Deploy (Rollback Logic)
tasks.description: Update Deploy-VPS.ps1 to automatically rollback PM2 state if Health Check fails.

tasks.title: Rate Limit Persistence (SQLite)
tasks.description: Move rate limits to a persistent store to prevent limit evasion on restart.

tasks.title: Production Dockerization
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile/docker-compose to standardize Node v20 environment across local and VPS.

tasks.title: Interactive Terminal (xterm.js)
tasks.description: Stream output from tools/vcms-scan.js directly to the Dashboard UI.

tasks.title: Integration Test Suite
tasks.description: Expand tests to cover the full API cycle (Scan -> Sync -> Chat).

tasks.title: API v2 Transition
tasks.description: Refactor router to support /api/v1 and /api/v2 naming for breaking changes management.

tasks.title: Remote Ecosystem Pulse
tasks.description: Extend dashboard to check HTTP health of all modules (e.g., flexgrafik.nl status).

tasks.title: Zasada 12: Automated Reporting
tasks.description: Integrate auto-handoff generation into the CLI tools.
